title: carum montanum
intro: Carum montanum, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carum montanum include reducing menstrual cramps, improving blood circulation, and supporting immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as a dried root, decoction, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
